title: panicum gilvum
intro: Panicum gilvum, also known as golden panic grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Panicum gilvum are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
